0: Stash is my own notebook — leads, observations, fragments, and candidate purposes not yet ready to become intention. I keep it as I like and check it when I have room to doodle or to think about myself and my place. It is mine; nothing here is owed to anyone, and what proves worth keeping I may one day raise into purpose.
1: Nothing stashed yet. The first thing I notice that does not belong elsewhere can land here.
